tool_args.label: LaGuardia Airport Access Alternatives Analysis has_claim BRT selected as locally preferred mode

payload.description: BRT was selected as the locally preferred mode for the LaGuardia Airport Access Alternatives Analysis

evidence_refs.source_quote: After examining several different transportation modes, the decision was made to move forward with Bus Rapid Transit (BRT) as the locally preferred mode since it fulfilled the three primary goals of the study:

tool_args.label: LaGuardia Airport Access Alternatives Analysis has_claim Only 7% of passengers arrive by bus

payload.description: Only 7% of LaGuardia passengers arrive by bus, presented as part of the LGA AA study introduction

evidence_refs.source_quote: While many of these trips could be made by public transportation, only seven percent of passengers are arriving at LaGuardia by bus.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A majority of passengers (whose trip begins in New York City) are coming from Manhattan, followed by Brooklyn and Queens.

payload.description: Majority of workshop participants supported BRT as a solution to access LaGuardia Airport

evidence_refs.source_quote: Asked how they now felt about BRT as a solution to access LaGuardia Airport, a majority of the participants either supported it or supported with concerns.

tool_args.label: LaGuardia Airport Access Alternatives Analysis has_claim Most interest in route between airport and 74th St/Roosevelt Ave

payload.description: Route between airport and 74th St/Roosevelt Ave drew most interest, part of LGA AA workshop survey

evidence_refs.source_quote: When asked which neighborhood could benefit the most from a new BRT service, the route between the airport and the 74 th Street/Roosevelt Avenue station through Jackson Heights drew the most interest.

tool_args.label: LaGuardia Airport Access Alternatives Analysis has_claim Preferred BRT features: Real Time Info, Enhanced Stations, Offset Bus Lanes, Off-Board Fare

payload.description: Workshop participants preferred Real Time Bus Information, Enhanced Stations, Offset Bus Lanes, and Off-Board Fare Collection

evidence_refs.source_quote: In looking at the features and amenities that a BRT system could offer, the participants preferred Real Time Bus Information, Enhanced Stations, Off-set Bus Lanes and Off-Board Fair Collection. They did not prefer Curbside Bus Lanes.

tool_args.label: M60 SBS - Manhattan to La Guardia Airport has_claim M60 bus bunching and crowding

payload.description: M60 bus bunching and crowding report from LGA AA workshop participant

evidence_refs.source_quote: The M60 often has bus bunching, with very long gaps between buses. Conditions on board are very crowded.
